description: Transform the raw text draft of Pacific Coast Tacos' Back of House (BOH) Operations Manual at ~/Documents/TextDocuments/pct_boh_manual_draft.docx into a professionally formatted document. Format the title 'PACIFIC COAST TACOS - BACK OF HOUSE OPERATIONS' as Centered, 18pt, and Bold. Format the three main headings ('1.0 MORNING PREP', '2.0 LINE ASSEMBLY', '3.0 CLOSING PROCEDURES') as Centered, 16pt, and Bold. Format the five sub-headings ('1.1 Produce Station', '1.2 Prep Recipes', '2.1 Protein Station', '2.2 Toppings Station', '3.1 Logs') as Left-aligned, 14pt, and Bold. Format the three 'CRITICAL SAFETY:' warnings to be Bold, Italic, and Underlined. Convert the comma-separated data under '3.1 Logs' starting with 'Item, Frequency, Target Temp' into a 3-column, 4-row table. Save the final document to ~/Documents/TextDocuments/pct_boh_manual_final.docx.

metadata.title_str: PACIFIC COAST TACOS - BACK OF HOUSE OPERATIONS
